<h3 class="text-lg font-medium text-gray-900">暂无评论</h3>\n          </div>\n\n          <div id="comment-list" class="space-y-6 hidden"></div>\n\n          <div id="error-state" class="bg-white rounded-lg p-8 text-center hidden">\n            <div class="mx-auto h-16 w-16 text-red-400 mb-4">\n              <i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation text-4xl"></i>\n            </div>\n            <h3 class="text-lg font-medium text-gray-900">加载评论失败</h3>\n            <button id="retry-btn" class="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-400">\n              重新加载\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      '}},{key:"cacheElements",value:function(){this.elements={loading:this.container.querySelector("#loading"),emptyState:this.container.querySelector("#empty-state"),commentList:this.container.querySelector("#comment-list"),errorState:this.container.querySelector("#error-state"),commentCount:this.container.querySelector("#comment-count"),retryBtn:this.container.querySelector("#retry-btn"),originalPostLink:this.container.querySelector("#original-post-link")}}},{key:"bindEvents",value:function(){var t=this;this.elements.retryBtn.addEventListener("click",function(){t.elements.errorState.classList.add("hidden"),t.elements.loading.classList.remove("hidden"),t.fetchAndRenderComments()})}},{key:"formatDateTime",value:function(t){if(!t)return"未知时间";var n=new Date(t);return"".concat(n.getFullYear(),"-").concat(String(n.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,"0"),"-").concat(String(n.getDate()).padStart(2,"0")," ").concat(String(n.getHours()).padStart(2,"0"),":").concat(String(n.getMinutes()).padStart(2,"0"))}},{key:"filterComments",value:function(t){return t.filter(function(t){return!1===t.sensitive&&["public","unlisted"].includes(t.visibility)})}},{key:"sortRootCommentsDesc",value:function(t){return t.sort(function(t,n){return new Date(n.created_at).getTime()-new Date(t.created_at).getTime()})}},{key:"sortReplyCommentsAsc",value:function(t){return t.sort(function(t,n){return new Date(t.created_at).getTime()-new Date(n.created_at).getTime()})}},{key:"buildCommentHierarchy",value:function(t){var n=this,e=this.config.TOOT_ID,r=new Map;t.forEach(function(t){r.set(t.id,k(k({},t),{},{replies:[]}))});var o=[];t.forEach(function(t){var n=r.get(t.id);t.in_reply_to_id===e&&o.push(n)});var a=this.sortRootCommentsDesc(o);return t.forEach(function(t){var n=r.get(t.id);if(t.in_reply_to_id!==e){var i=r.get(t.in_reply_to_id);if(i)if(o.includes(i))i.replies.push(n);else{for(var c=i;c&&!o.includes(c);)c=r.get(c.in_reply_to_id);c?c.replies.push(n):a.push(n)}else a.push(n)}}),a.forEach(function(t){t.replies=n.sortReplyCommentsAsc(t.replies)}),a}},{key:"renderComment",value:function(t){var n=this;return'\n        <div class="'.concat(arguments.length>1&&void 0!==arguments[1]&&arguments[1]?"bg-gray-100 rounded-lg p-4":"bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm p-6 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow",'" data-comment-id="').concat(t.id,'">\n            <div class="flex items-start mb-4">\n                <div class="flex-shrink-0 mr-4">\n                    <a href="').concat(t.account.url,'" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">\n                        <img class="h-12 w-12 rounded-full object-cover"\n                             src="').concat(t.account.avatar,'"\n                             alt="').concat(t.account.acct,'"\n                             onerror="this.src=\'https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=999\'"\n                    </a>\n                </div>\n                <div>\n                    <a href="').concat(t.account.url,'" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="font-medium text-lg text-gray-900 hover:text-blue-500">\n                        ').concat(t.account.acct||"未知用户",'\n                    </a>\n                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">\n                        <time>').concat(this.formatDateTime(t.created_at),'</time>\n                    </p>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class="text-gray-700 leading-relaxed ml-16">\n                ').concat(t.content||"<p>无内容</p>","\n            </div>\n\n            ").concat(t.replies&&t.replies.length>0?'<div class="ml-8 border-l-2 border-gray-200 pl-6 space-y-4 mt-4">\n                    '.concat(t.replies.map(function(t){return n.renderReplyComment(t)}).join(""),"\n                  </div>"):"","\n        </div>\n      ")}},{key:"renderReplyComment",value:function(t){return'\n        <div class="bg-gray-100 rounded-lg p-4" data-comment-id="'.concat(t.id,'">\n            <div class="flex items-start mb-4">\n                <div class="flex-shrink-0 mr-4">\n                    <a href="').concat(t.account.url,'" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">\n                        <img class="h-12 w-12 rounded-full object-cover"\n                             src="').concat(t.account.avatar,'"\n                             alt="').concat(t.account.acct,'"\n                             onerror="this.src="https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=999"">\n                    </a>\n                </div>\n                <div>\n                    <a href="').concat(t.account.url,'" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="font-medium text-lg text-gray-900 hover:text-blue-500">\n                        ').concat(t.account.acct||"未知用户",'\n                    </a>\n                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">\n                        <time>').concat(this.formatDateTime(t.created_at),'</time>\n                    </p>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class="text-gray-700 leading-relaxed ml-16">\n                ').concat(t.content||"<p>无内容</p>","\n            </div>\n        </div>\n      ")}},{key:"renderComments",value:function(t){var n=this,e=this.filterComments(t);if(this.elements.commentCount.textContent=e.length,this.elements.loading.classList.add("hidden"),this.elements.errorState.classList.add("hidden"),0===e.length)return this.elements.commentList.classList.add("hidden"),void this.elements.emptyState.classList.remove("hidden");this.elements.commentList.classList.remove("hidden");var r=this.buildCommentHierarchy(e);this.elements.commentList.innerHTML=r.map(function(t){return n.renderComment(t)}).join("")}},{key:"fetchAndRenderComments",value:(e=v().m(function t(){var n,e,r,o,a,i,c;return v().w(function(t){for(;;)switch(t.p=t.n){case 0:return t.p=0,n=this.config,e=n.MASTODON_DOMAIN,r=n.MASTODON_USER,o=n.TOOT_ID,this.elements.originalPostLink.href="https://".concat(e,"/@").concat(r,"/").concat(o),t.n=1,fetch("https://".concat(e,"/api/v1/statuses/").concat(o,"/context"));case 1:if((a=t.v).ok){t.n=2;break}throw new Error("请求失败: ".concat(a.status));case 2:return t.n=3,a.json();case 3:i=t.v,this.renderComments(i.descendants||[]),t.n=5;break;case 4:t.p=4,c=t.v,console.error("获取评论失败:",c),this.elements.loading.classList.add("hidden"),this.elements.errorState.classList.remove("hidden");case 5:return t.a(2)}},t,this,[[0,4]])}),r=function(){var t=this,n=arguments;return new Promise(function(r,o){var a=e.apply(t,n);function i(t){b(a,r,o,i,c,"next",t)}function c(t){b(a,r,o,i,c,"throw",t)}i(void 0)})},function(){return r.apply(this,arguments)})}],n&&S(t.prototype,n),Object.defineProperty(t,"prototype",{writable:!1}),t;var t,n,e,r}();t.initMastodonComments=function(t){return n&&console.warn("Mastodon Comments 已初始化，将重新创建实例"),n=new e(t)}}(window)})();
